_comment: Order-distance-label demo (#413): hold Space so the orders overlay is live, select the Spearmen (seed 12345, ~500,300), then right-click a long march south. The green move line now carries a metric distance label at its midpoint (e.g. '13 m'), in the same units as the map-scale legend, and the number counts down as the regiment closes on its target. hold_space fires at tick 2 so the overlay is up before the move order lands.
